text: Every day, I follow the same routine to stay productive and healthy. I wake up at 6 a.m., drink a glass of water, and go for a 20-minute jog. After a quick shower, I have breakfast and then head to work by 8:30 a.m. My job as an office manager keeps me busy until 5 p.m., with a short lunch break in between. In the evening, I either cook dinner or meet friends for a walk. Before bed, I read for half an hour to relax. This consistency helps me feel organized and balanced.
